login.title: Log in
login.business_hint: Tenant staff and administrators should use the <1>business login page</1>.

business_login.title: Business log in
business_login.description: Sign-in page for tenant administrators, staff, and system administrators.
business_login.customer_hint: Customers should use the <1>standard login page</1>.

verify_email.title: Verify your email
verify_email.description: Thanks for signing up. Before getting started, please click the link in the email we just sent to verify your email address. If you didn't receive the email, we can resend it.
verify_email.status_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your registered email address.
verify_email.status_failed: We could not send the verification email. Please try again later.
